title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Terraria: The Board Game**
*2026*
Dig, fight, explore and build in this co-op adventure for 1-4 intrepid Terrarians!
![Terraria: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_1f1a9841.jpg)

2. **The Legacy Of Mars**
*2027*
Discover new planets to terraform, and new ways to do it!
![The Legacy Of Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_79b8b0d3.jpg)

3. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_233afadb.png)

4. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_ad41898b.png)

5. **Toy Battle**
*2025*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_78177240.jpg)

6. **Habitats**
*2016*
Build a wildlife park - but be sure to give your animals the terrain they need!
![Habitats](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_577a9a79.jpg)

7. **Vantage**
*2025*
Explore an entire planet's open world from a first-person perspective.
![Vantage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_92c3f2a8.jpg)

8. **Feya's Swamp**
*2025*
Rise as the most prosperous clan in this magical swamp.
![Feya's Swamp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_7ccb2e7e.png)

9. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_1edf85a6.jpg)

10. **Rolling Deep**
*2027*
Journey to the Center of the Earth in this Balatro-inspired roguelike dice game.
![Rolling Deep](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_9c5f8f47.jpg)

11. **Hot Streak**
*2025*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_90cfc7be.jpg)

12. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_0308a0cd.png)

13. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_b76c1563.png)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_aa323058.jpg)

15. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_2f868174.jpg)

16. **Emberleaf**
*2025*
Rally heroes, reclaim the forest, and restore the Emberlings' sacred homeland.
![Emberleaf](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_309d2e56.jpg)

17. **The Secret Valley**
*2021*
Migrate to new territories in search of the mysterious Secret Valley.
![The Secret Valley](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_7eec6f53.jpg)

18. **Galactic Cruise**
*2025*
Build and launch ships to send guests on luxurious space vacations.
![Galactic Cruise](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_cebf3ec9.jpg)

19. **Dungeons of the Oak Dell**
*2025*
Innovative fighting system, letting you immerse in every hit you deal to a monster!
![Dungeons of the Oak Dell](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_287048ed.jpg)

20. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_a7ddb7a8.jpg)

21. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_b6739112.jpg)

22. **Compania**
*2025*
Grow your fledgling company to become the richest in the world of Factoria.
![Compania](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_46116a9c.png)

23. **Star Trek: Captain's Chair**
*2025*
Step into the shoes of an iconic Star Trek captain and explore the galaxy!
![Star Trek: Captain's Chair](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_0006fab1.jpg)

24. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_f56344d1.png)

25. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_53a1b3be.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*16 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_3b506e6a.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*24 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_3b81b2b7.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*52 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_5cb692b4.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*19 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_29ed3288.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*88 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_42b69e2f.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*12 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_d771e568.png)

7. **Azul**
*102 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_87a51232.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*115 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.

9. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*41 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_af808f52.jpg)

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*34 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_d654620e.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*31 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_47776268.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*57 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_75106584.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*3 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_d60c7321.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*24 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_bea4c175.png)

15. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*17 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_1f95001f.jpg)

16. **Sky Team**
*31 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_d3409bf5.jpg)

17. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*64 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_26928d2f.jpg)

18. **The Gang**
*10 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_f2d759b5.jpg)

19. **Brass: Birmingham**
*17 months on the list*

![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_031b2758.jpg)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*10 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.

*3 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_8048c296.png)

22. **Carcassonne**
*274 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_c0d3e72b.jpg)

23. **The White Castle**
*30 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_e9ef8e65.jpg)

24. **SCOUT**
*41 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.

25. **Splendor**
*144 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-15/toplist/bgg_94cce32f.jpg)
